professional_summary: Full-stack software engineer with 6 years of experience building scalable backend services and responsive web applications. Expertise in Python, Django, and React with a track record of reducing system latency and improving deployment reliability through CI/CD automation and cloud-native architectures on AWS.

work_experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained REST APIs serving 2M+ daily requests using Python, Django, and PostgreSQL
Reduced API response time by 38% by introducing Redis caching and query optimization
Led migration of monolithic application to microservices architecture on AWS ECS, cutting deployment time by 55%
Implemented CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and Docker, enabling 4x faster release cycles
Mentored 3 junior engineers through code reviews and weekly 1:1 technical guidance sessions

work_experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed React front-end for SaaS dashboard serving 10,000+ active users
Designed and built PostgreSQL database schema reducing query complexity by 40%
Integrated third-party payment APIs (Stripe, Braintree) processing $2M+ in monthly transactions
Containerized 8 services with Docker and Kubernetes, improving staging environment parity

work_experience.title: Junior Software Developer
bullets: Built internal tooling dashboards using Flask and Vue.js for the operations team
Automated nightly data pipeline using Python scripts, saving 12 hours per week of manual work
Wrote unit and integration tests achieving 85% code coverage across 3 core services
Participated in on-call rotation, resolving 95% of production incidents within SLA

projects.name: OpenTrace API
projects.description: Open-source distributed tracing library for Python microservices with 800+ GitHub stars

projects.name: DevBoard
projects.description: Internal developer productivity dashboard aggregating metrics from Jira, GitHub, and PagerDuty
